root_failure.error: URLError: <urlopen error [Errno 8] nodename nor servname provided, or not known>

autopsy_finding.reporting_bug: The AP/Commerce summary logic checked Gov parse failure before provider_call_ok, so a Gov-row provider failure was mislabeled as GOV_CONTRACT_OR_TRUNCATION_FAILURE.
autopsy_finding.retry_policy_gap: urllib.error.URLError DNS text such as '[Errno 8] nodename nor servname provided, or not known' was not classified as retryable transport, so bounded retry metadata was not attached.

patch_plan.transport_classifier: Classify DNS-resolution URLError markers as DNS_RESOLUTION_ERROR and retryable under the pre-registered transport policy.
patch_plan.summary_precedence: Provider-call failure takes precedence over Gov parse/contract failure in invalidation_reason.
patch_plan.family_reporting: Future Commerce summaries use COMMERCE classification instead of stale AP classification.
